title: PairRecord v2
description: Cross-project paired bead set, intent-based. Emitted only for pair groups that share an ID suffix across distinct prefixes AND have at least one cross-prefix dep edge between members. The dep edge is the authoritative intent signal; suffix collision alone no longer surfaces a pair (v1's noise mode). `intent_source` names the channel that established intent — v2 emits the literal "dep".

suffix.description: ID suffix shared by every member of the paired set (everything after the first hyphen, e.g. 'zsy8' or 'mhwy.2').

canonical.description: First-created member of the paired set. Tie-broken by ID prefix ascending, then by full ID ascending.

mirrors.description: Remaining members of the paired set, sorted by ID prefix ascending.

drift.description: Ordered list of dimensions where any mirror diverges from canonical. Omitted for in-sync pairs. Fixed output order: status, priority, closed_open. `title` drift removed in v2 (no-signal on dogfood corpus).

intent_source.description: Channel that established intent for this pair. v2 emits the literal "dep" — the only currently-implemented signal. Additional values land when new intent channels exist (e.g., an upstream `paired_with` column).

status.description: Issue status (open, in_progress, blocked, deferred, pinned, hooked, review, closed, tombstone).

source_repo.description: Project/repo the member was loaded from. Populated by global-mode loaders; omitted for empty values.
